secondary_channels.Arcanist: measured diagram cuts and one controlled ledger casting line

silhouettes: tall asymmetric ledger mantle with exposed casting arm

units.survival_psychology: She prices uncertainty so that people and spells can be owned.

psychology_record.core_wound: The first time a paid kill erased a beloved person's face from her memory, profit made the intimate loss feel orderly.
psychology_record.private_want: To own enough people, knowledge, and possible outcomes that nothing important can disappear beyond retrieval again.
psychology_record.primary_fear: An unpriced uncertainty will expose that she no longer knows what she sacrificed, whom she loved, or why any acquisition matters.
psychology_record.survival_strategy: Price, classify, contract, and own every danger before it can surprise or abandon her.
psychology_record.villainous_distortion: She treats people as assets and spends their lives, choices, and memories as expendable capital.
psychology_record.current_emotional_state: Pleasurable certainty while closing an acquisition she believes is already hers.
psychology_record.emotional_contradiction: Inviting proprietary warmth over tightly concealed panic about the blank memory she cannot price.
psychology_record.face_direction: One eye sharply appraises the viewer while the other is fractionally unfocused; a tiny asymmetrical brow pinch and tight jaw betray fear beneath a small proprietary invitation at one mouth corner.
psychology_record.pose_direction: The large pale ledger crosses her center-left torso like a legal shield and extends beyond her contour; the opposite ink-dark hand is raised in a precise beckoning cast above a narrow planted stance.
psychology_record.forbidden_read: Generic aristocratic smirk, neutral beauty model, friendly merchant, angry executive, sad sorceress, or merely pretty occult accountant.

units.villain_read: patient warm acquisition that offers ownership as safety while spending people as entries
units.primary_prop: one huge pale cracked arcane ledger
units.supernatural_cost: paid kills erase memories and print them as tax-script through fingers and throat
units.body_lane: attractive lean toned feminine peak-condition adult woman, age 30-32
units.face_psychology: one sharp appraising eye, one fractionally unfocused memory-blank eye, asymmetrical brow tension, a tight jaw, and one small proprietary invitation show acquisition over concealed panic
units.protection_logic: none; mage role and survival strategy do not justify armor
